title: Villager Observatory
description: Adds a Villager Observatory to the game
body:
This mod adds a Villager Observatory to the game, featuring many Cartographer and Librarian villagers inside the new structure.
![Villager Observatory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/976541bdeeffe16ea8c8d57bb6231fd5bd02d781.jpeg)


- Explore the observatory to discover hidden chests, valuable loot, and a beautifully decorated interior.
- The Villager observatory can spawn in Plains, Sunflower Plains and Meadow biomes.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d15eff3c083b97167543df98e97c31fcf513b242.jpeg)
  
**Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks**

 

 

_special thanks to Karelien!_
